en_title: Reality Upon Each Step Of The Heel
en_body:
i stand there
i want to go:
 i lift my right foot,
 i take one step forward
 and place the heel of my right foot
 down,

 i lift my left foot again,
 i take one more step forward
 and place the heel of my left foot
 down...
the earth spins thousands of miles each second
along an orbit to keep Life in rhythm
from inside the tiny head upon the human neck
the ancestors of humankind ordained the measure of Time
gathering it into the society of human right-and-wrong,
amid the chaos of echoes and forms
above the insects, above fierce beasts of sacred forests
yet helpless before Nature's raging calamities...
this realm the Creator brought into being
where humans and all creatures dwell together
is volcano, is flood and storm, is landslide
some say that the other face of GOD
bears within it the nature of the devil...
GOD created the human being
one shoulder worships Mister Good
the other shoulder plays wantonly with Mister Evil
and the multitude is easily deceived
to create war
wearing the resounding hat called Revolution
wearing the cloak of fair words called Righteousness:
i am still alive
therefore i still have steps forward
i only pray that
the level earth remain truly firm
beneath the heels of my two feet:
and may i walk within good fortune
still able to step forward
steps of Consciousness
to meet Destiny private and shared
upon the face of the green planet
in deep awareness of the most ordinary Miracle:
may i be spared
both Nature's calamity and human disaster!

and how i love the silent sustaining
of Life beneath my two tender heels
may the principle of Life
 inside my argumentative complicated head
be as simple as the stepping forward
 of these two fragile heels.
(8:45 p.m. cst-usa, Monday, 10/09/2007)

Reality Upon Each Step Of The Heel
i stand there
i want to go:
 i lift my right foot,
 i take one step forward
 and place the heel of my right foot
 down,

 i lift my left foot again,
 i take one more step forward
 and place the heel of my left foot
 down...
the earth spins thousands of miles each second
along an orbit to keep Life in rhythm
from inside the tiny head upon the human neck

gathering it into the society of human right-and-wrong,
amid the chaos of echoes and forms
above the insects, above fierce beasts of sacred forests
yet helpless before Nature's raging calamities...
this realm the Creator brought into being
where humans and all creatures dwell together
is volcano, is flood and storm, is landslide
some say that the other face of GOD
bears within it the nature of the devil...
GOD created the human being
one shoulder worships Mister Good

and the multitude is easily deceived
to create war

(8:45 p.m. cst-usa, Monday, 10/09/2007)
note: The poem braids mindful walking with a theodicy in which natural catastrophe and human violence test faith in the Creator.
